name: ResNet50V2
fullName: Identity Mappings in Deep Residual Networks (V2)
description: Improved ResNet architecture with pre-activation, improving gradient flow and training stability. Better performance than original ResNet50 with similar parameters.

educationalNote.summary: Retinal layer receiving raw RGB pixel matrices.
educationalNote.detailed: Accepts normalized three-channel RGB images of size 224x224. This spatial standardization ensures weight compatibility in subsequent layers.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Establishes spatial dimensions for the network.
educationalNote.keyTakeaway: Fixed input sizes are critical to prevent spatial alignment errors.

educationalNote.summary: Zero padding for the large conv1 kernel.
educationalNote.detailed: Pads borders with zeros to keep convolution dimensions matching standard Keras shapes.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Required to properly shape spatial grids in stem layers.

calculationSteps.label: Kernel Weights
calculationSteps.explanation: 64 independent filters of size 7x7 operating over 3 input channels.

calculationSteps.label: Biases
calculationSteps.explanation: One bias parameter per output channel.

educationalNote.detailed: First spatial feature extractor, shrinking inputs to 112x112.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Captures general contours while saving computing costs.

educationalNote.detailed: Pads input features before max pooling to fit spatial shapes.
Filters feature map to reduce resolution to 56x56.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Extracts translation invariant features and drops compute size.

calculationSteps.label: Parameters
calculationSteps.explanation: Pre-activation Batch Normalization scale and shift vectors.

educationalNote.detailed: Normalizes block inputs before applying convolutions, stabilizing gradient updates.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: The core V2 enhancement that guarantees identity skip paths.
educationalNote.keyTakeaway: Normalizing inputs before convolution yields smoother updates.

educationalNote.detailed: Activates the inputs before projection and convolution branches.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Permits full non-linear learning representation prior to convolutional mapping.

educationalNote.summary: Shortcut projection mapping channels and grids.
educationalNote.detailed: Outputs matched channel dimensions using 1x1 conv over pre-activated inputs.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Synchronizes feature shapes for residual add.

educationalNote.detailed: Compresses channels to bottleneck dimensions, preserving spatial features.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Saves computations prior to the spatial convolution.

educationalNote.detailed: Normalizes compressed activations.
Rectifies features to prepare for spatial convolutions.
Adds zero borders around features before spatial filtering.
Convolves 3x3 kernel over spatial grids to extract patterns. Performs downsampling if stride=2.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Core feature extractor layer in ResNet block.

educationalNote.detailed: Normalizes extracted spatial channels.
Non-linear mapping prior to channel expansion.
Expands output from 64 channels back to 256 channels.

educationalNote.summary: Performs element-wise residual addition: F(x) + x.
educationalNote.detailed: Combines the block input directly with the main residual path. The output is unactivated, preserving clean gradient paths.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: V2 identity connections propagate gradients directly across blocks without non-linear gating.
educationalNote.keyTakeaway: Direct identity summation improves backpropagation flow.

calculationSteps.label: Parameters
calculationSteps.explanation: Final output Batch Normalization scales and shifts.

educationalNote.detailed: Pre-activation architectures add a final BN to normalize feature maps before pooling.
Locks final features as active positive values before average pooling.

educationalNote.summary: Averages spatial dimensions to form a global feature vector.
educationalNote.detailed: Averages each 7x7 channel representation to a single vector, regularizing representations.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: GAP acts as a global regularizer and reduces downstream parameters by 98%.
educationalNote.keyTakeaway: Replaces heavy fully connected layers with zero parameters.

educationalNote.summary: Computes probabilities for the 1,000 target classes.
educationalNote.detailed: Uses softmax activation function to compute class probabilities.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Converts numerical logits into values that sum to 1.

groups.name: Input Stem
groups.description: Stem layers downsampling the high-res input image to 56x56.

groups.name: Stage 2 Block 1
groups.description: Pre-activation bottleneck block: BN-ReLU → Conv 1x1 → BN-ReLU → Conv 3x3 → BN-ReLU → Conv 1x1.

groups.name: Stage 2 Block 2
groups.description: Pre-activation bottleneck block: BN-ReLU → Conv 1x1 → BN-ReLU → Conv 3x3 → BN-ReLU → Conv 1x1.
